loraTrain.title: LoRA Training
loraTrain.stepBaseDesc: Choose a base diffusion model. Flux.1-dev, Z-Image Base, and Qwen-Image support DreamBooth training.
loraTrain.stepDatasetDesc: Pick or create a dataset in the library, then add 3+ captioned images. The selected base model center-crops and snaps sizes to its VAE grid automatically — no manual resizing.
loraTrain.stepConfigDesc: Pick a training preset and the prompt used for progress previews during training.
loraTrain.stepConfirmDesc: Review your configuration, then submit the job to the global queue.
loraTrain.selectDatasetFirst: Select or create a dataset first
loraTrain.datasetPersistNote: Datasets are persistent. Rename or remove individual images — whole-dataset delete is not supported.
loraTrain.applyDefaultDone: Default caption applied to all images
loraTrain.resolutionAutoCrop: Auto crop by base model (face-biased for portraits)
loraTrain.noDatasets: No datasets yet — create one above
loraTrain.selectOrCreateDataset: Select or create a dataset to continue
loraTrain.dropzoneTitle: Drop images here or click to upload
loraTrain.dropzoneHint: JPG / PNG / WebP supported; you can also import from gallery
loraTrain.defaultPromptHint: e.g. A photo of sks person (must match preview prompt below)
loraTrain.defaultPromptDesc: Default caption for newly imported images; edit per image below.
loraTrain.removeImageConfirm: Remove this image from the dataset?
loraTrain.progressPromptDesc: Unified caption for training and verify generation — must match the dataset default caption or the LoRA face will not appear.
loraTrain.outputNameDesc: Name when registering the trained adapter to your LoRA list.
loraTrain.confirmIntro: Review the settings below, then submit to the global queue. You can browse elsewhere while training runs.

presetDesc.quick: ~300–400 steps — good for validating dataset and captions
presetDesc.standard: Recommended default — balance of quality and time
presetDesc.quality: More steps — best for final output
presetDesc.custom: Set iterations, rank, and learning rate manually

loraTrain.runInBackgroundHint: Training runs in the background queue. You can leave this page — progress updates live.
loraTrain.trainedLorasIntro: LoRAs registered after training, ready for image generation. View training runs on the LoRA training page.
loraTrain.importGalleryHint: Pick images from your library. You can select multiple before confirming.

image.createDesc: Generate from text alone—no source image. Tune resolution, steps, LoRA, etc. in advanced parameters.
image.retouchDesc: Paint the area to redraw; the model fills it from your prompt.
image.rewriteDesc: Describe edits in natural language; optional mask for precise control.
image.extendDesc: Expand the canvas; the model extends the image beyond the original bounds.
image.upscaleDesc: Pick an upscale-ready model and a source image, set scale/denoise, then submit (no prompt required).

video.upscaleDesc: Pick a SeedVR2 video restoration model and a source video, set scale/denoise/max frames, then submit (no prompt). Uses spatiotemporal latents for better temporal consistency.

studio.workTitlePlaceholder: Name this creation for easier browsing in Works (optional)
studio.logsEmptyHint: Key steps and progress appear here after you start a job
studio.pipelineGraphEmpty: Phase status appears once the task starts
studio.notDownloadedMsg: Open the Models page to download this model
studio.taskIdAiHint: Share this task ID with AI or support to fetch task details and logs (GET /api/tasks/{id}, GET /api/tasks/{id}/logs).
studio.controlnetFluxOnly: Structural guide requires a FLUX.1 base model (e.g. flux1-dev)
studio.controlnetNoImg2img: Structural guide cannot combine with reference img2img — clear the reference image
studio.controlnetNotReady: Install the selected ControlNet bundle on the Models page before generating
studio.controlnetMlxOnly: FLUX ControlNet (structural guide / Fill) is MLX-only for now; CUDA support is planned in a unified batch. Use Apple Silicon or wait for the CUDA release.
studio.controlnetBundleHint: Install the matching ControlNet bundle (Models) plus a FLUX.1 base; upload any image — Canny edges are extracted at generation time
studio.controlnetDepthHint: Install flux-depth-controlnet, depth-pro (Tools), and a FLUX.1 base; depth is estimated at generation time (requires PyTorch)
studio.controlnetReduxHint: Install flux-redux and a FLUX.1 base; guide image is encoded via SigLIP+Redux into text context (PyTorch preprocess)
studio.controlnetFillHint: FLUX Fill is for inpainting/outpainting — use retouch/extend from the node toolbar, not text-to-image
studio.controlnetFillEditOnly: FLUX Fill supports retouch/extend edits only, not text-to-image structural guide
studio.controlnetCompanionLoraHint: Companion structural LoRA loads automatically; strength matches the slider above
studio.retouchFillHint: Inpainting requires flux-fill-controlnet; paint the mask (white = repaint). CFG ≈ 30 recommended.
studio.extendFillHint: Outpainting requires flux-fill-controlnet; pick directions and pixels (canvas preview). CFG ≈ 30 recommended.
studio.uploadControlImage:
Upload a control image
(features are extracted automatically)
studio.uploadEditImage: Upload or pick an image to edit
studio.editImageEmptyHint: Use Upload, Asset library, or Recent thumbnails at the top of this card
studio.modelNotReadyDesc: Model '{name}' version '{version}' is not ready. Fetch it on the Models page first.
studio.submitOomHint: This version is listed at about {modelGb} GB, near or above the soft cap of ~{refGb} GB (min of system RAM and MLX memory limit in Settings). Generation may still run or may fail with memory errors—you can submit anyway; raise the MLX limit or free RAM if needed.
studio.adapterLoadFailed: Failed to load compatible LoRA / ControlNet list
studio.noOutputAsset: Marked complete but no output asset: {msg}
studio.noOutputAssetHint: Often a mid-run cancel or a run that never registered an asset; successful outputs live under outputs/assets/.
studio.needControlImage: Please upload a control image when using ControlNet
studio.drawMask: Please draw a mask area first
studio.turboModelHint: Want faster previews? Try Z-Image-Turbo (reloads model)

models.pageSubtitle: Downloads, imports, and local model management

audio.title: Audio Create
audio.promptPlaceholder: Describe the music you want, e.g. upbeat electronic dance with heavy bass...
audio.lyricsPlaceholder:
[Verse 1]
Write your lyrics here...
[Chorus]
Your chorus...
audio.lyricsHint: Optional. For vocals, add singable lines and turn off Instrumental. Conditioning uses the full lyric block; text beyond ~2048 tokens is truncated at the tail, so later verses may not be sung. Prefer shorter lyrics or multiple runs for long songs.
audio.lyricsRequiredHint: Required. This model needs real lyrics (optional tags like [verse], [chorus]); gray placeholder text is not submitted—type singable lines yourself.
audio.lyricsRequiredAceHint: Required. Add lyrics or use AI Generate Lyrics; 5Hz LM only formats metadata and will not invent lyrics from the prompt.
audio.lyricsRequired: Lyrics are required. Models like DiffRhythm 2 need lyrics; placeholder hint text is not sent.
audio.vocalTypeHint: Appends a caption template to your description (not a guaranteed model knob). Duet/chorus are unstable — try different seeds. Skipped if your prompt already mentions vocals.
audio.durationHint: Registry max {max}s. Longer clips take more time; lyrics are not aligned line-by-line to the timeline — try 30–90s first, then extend.
audio.sampleQualityDesc: More steps = richer detail, slower generation
audio.guidanceDesc: Higher values follow the prompt more closely
audio.temperatureDesc: Higher = more random; lower = more stable
audio.codecStepsDesc: Neural codec ODE steps; more steps can improve quality but run slower
audio.playbackFailed: Playback failed. Try again in a moment.
audio.effectiveLyricsHint: Full lyric text sent to ACE-Step (including 5Hz LM rewrite). Not word-synced to the waveform; sung words may differ.
audio.coverSourceHint: Upload the song or vocal track to reinterpret (ACE-Step cover).
audio.coverPromptPlaceholder: Optional: jazz piano cover, female vocal, slower tempo…
audio.coverPromptHint: Optional caption hint; higher fidelity keeps more of the original performance.
audio.coverFidelityHint: 1.0 = stay closest to the source; lower values allow more creative drift.
audio.coverNeedSource: Please upload a reference audio file
audio.coverDurationHint: Leave default to match reference length
audio.coverLyricsHint: Custom lyrics for the reinterpretation. Leave empty for instrumental.

create.title: AI Image Creation
create.inpaintingDesc: Paint the area to redraw, AI will fill it based on prompt
create.textEditingDesc: Describe how to modify the image in natural language
create.outpaintingDesc: Expand image boundaries, AI will generate extended content
create.img2imgFromGallery: Source image loaded from Works; switched to Edit image.
create.extendNeedDirection: Pick at least one edge to expand
create.rewriteDriveReferenceDesc: Image-guided full redraw (img2img): keeps more of the source; tune strength / fidelity in advanced parameters.
create.rewriteDriveInstructDesc: Instruction-style edits with FLUX Kontext or Qwen Image Edit; follows the prompt more closely—use reference mode or another model if the look drifts.
create.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
create.negativePlaceholder: Describe what you do not want...
create.refImageNeeded: This preset is for img2img, please add a reference image first
create.notDownloadedMsg: Open the Models page to download this model
create.presetNeedsEditTab: This preset targets image editing. Switch to Edit image, pick a source image, then load again.
create.turboModelHint: Want faster previews? Try Z-Image-Turbo (reloads model)

composerTip.enhance: Expand prompt with local LLM; then replace or append
composerTip.reversePrompt: Reverse a descriptive prompt from the reference image
composerTip.refImage: Add a reference image for img2img or style guidance
composerTip.preset: Insert a saved prompt template snippet
composerTip.enhanceMusicBrief: Polish the music brief (genre, mood, instruments)
composerTip.generateLyrics: Generate structured lyrics from the music description
composerTip.lyricsEmpty: Enter a music description before generating lyrics
composerTip.pickCoverSource: Pick source audio for cover mode
composerTip.reversePromptVideo: Reverse video prompt from the start frame
composerTip.addTailFrame: Add end frame for start–end interpolation
composerTip.llmApplyReplace: Replace current text with the result
composerTip.llmApplyAppend: Append the result to current text

create.reverseNeedAsset: Needs a gallery asset reference (asset:) to reverse

video.title: AI Video Creation
video.promptPlaceholder: Describe the video you want to generate...
video.negativePlaceholder: Describe what you do not want...
video.notDownloadedMsg: Open the Models page to download this model
video.presetNeedsStartImage: This preset targets image-to-video; add a start image first
video.runtimeGenWarning: Local runs often take several minutes to 15+ minutes. You can leave this page and watch the header task queue.
video.runtimeModelSize: This weight version is about {size} on disk; leave enough Apple unified memory.
video.needStartImage: Animate requires a start image—upload or pick one first.
video.tailFrameHint: Some models support first–last frame; leave empty if unused.
video.upscaleNeedSource: Upload or pick a source video for restoration first.
video.runtimeUpscaleNote: Output frame rate comes only from ffprobe on the source; if probing fails the task errors (no fps fallback). Restoration time grows with frame count and chunk size; trim long clips or lower max frames.

gallery.title: Works
gallery.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
gallery.lyricsInstrumental: Instrumental track — no lyric text saved.
gallery.lyricsUnavailable: Lyrics were not saved on this asset. Regenerate with the current app version, or check the audio create page after the task finishes.

canvas.title: Infinite Canvas
canvas.controlNetRequired: Select a ControlNet model in the composer first
canvas.pasteImportHint: Paste copied canvas JSON to import a session
canvas.noPromptForNote: No prompt to save for this image
canvas.emptyStep1: Click Import works (bottom-right) to pick from your library
canvas.emptyStep2: Or switch to Gallery at the top and use Add to canvas on hover
canvas.emptyStep3: Select a node and use the floating toolbar (edit / branch / AI note)
canvas.emptyStep4: Generate from the composer — outputs land in the staging zone; press S to snap beside selection
canvas.emptyHint: Import works without leaving canvas view
canvas.importWorksHint: Click to multi-select, double-click to import one. On-canvas items are labeled.
canvas.importWorksEmpty: No works in library yet — generate or upload first
canvas.importNothingNew: All selected works are already on the canvas
canvas.scaleHint: Shift or Alt + scroll scales the selected node
canvas.shortcutEscape: Esc — exit rename/search → close panel → clear selection
canvas.shortcutLayers: L layers · G graph · E edges · I import · R guides · S snap staging · Y lineage · F2 rename
canvas.importDoubleClickHint: Double-click a thumbnail to import one item
canvas.shortcutPan: Space / ⌘/Ctrl + drag to pan · drag empty area to marquee
canvas.workspaceEntered: Canvas workspace: select a node, outputs land in staging (I import · S snap · R guides)
canvas.stagingHint: Generated results land here; drag or snap beside a node
canvas.lineageEdgesShown: Lineage edges shown (parent is on canvas)
canvas.lineageClickHint: Click to focus on canvas · double-click to jump and close sidebar
canvas.lineageDrawerHint: Click to focus on canvas · double-click to jump and close
canvas.lineageJumpHint: Focus this node on the canvas
canvas.lineageJumpMissing: Asset not in the gallery — refresh and try again
canvas.lineageSelectHint: Select an image on the canvas to view its lineage
canvas.sessionGraphEmpty: No nodes on this canvas yet
canvas.branchHint: Staging moved beside selection — ready to generate
canvas.animateBranchHint: Switched to image-to-video with start frame bound — staging ready
canvas.upscaleBranchHint: Switched to video upscale with source bound — staging ready
canvas.coverBranchHint: Switched to Cover with source audio bound — staging ready
canvas.referenceBranchHint: Switched to img2img with reference bound — staging ready
canvas.controlBranchHint: Structural guide + ControlNet bound — staging ready
canvas.aiDescribeVisionDone: Vision AI note saved from image
canvas.importMediaMismatch: JSON media type does not match current canvas
canvas.sessionCopied: Canvas session JSON copied to clipboard
canvas.controlImageRequired: ControlNet is enabled — pick a structural guide image
canvas.controlImageAssetRequired: Guide image must be a gallery asset

assistant.title: Creative Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Vision reverse-prompt, reference analysis, and batch tasks — use the wand in each composer for quick enhance
assistant.pageSubtitle: Image-to-prompt, reference analysis, and lyrics batches — use the composer wand for one-shot enhance
assistant.composerHint: Use the wand in Image / Video / Audio composers for one-shot enhance. Use the creative assistant for image-to-prompt, reference analysis, and task-card batches.
assistant.llmRequiredHint: Install an LLM from Models (see Settings → General → Default LLM Model).

desc.enhance_image: Expand a short idea into a rich English prompt for text-to-image (InvokeAI-style).
desc.image_to_prompt: Reverse-engineer a generation prompt from a reference image (MindCraft-style).
desc.image_to_prompt_video: Reverse-engineer a video prompt from a keyframe — motion, camera, and temporal mood for image-to-video.
desc.analyze_reference: Visual intelligence: style, palette, subject, and reusable keywords.
desc.enhance_video: Expand camera motion, pacing, and mood for video generation.
desc.generate_lyrics: Write ACE-Step structured lyrics from a music description.
desc.enhance_music_brief: Polish a music brief for ACE-Step genre and mood.

assistant.enhancePlaceholder: e.g. cyberpunk girl, neon rainy night, wet reflections
assistant.videoPlaceholder: e.g. slow dolly in, subject turns to window, cinematic warm light
assistant.musicBriefPlaceholder: e.g. Japanese city pop, night drive, synth and female vocal
assistant.lyricsPlaceholder: e.g. upbeat summer pop about the beach and youth
assistant.analyzePlaceholder: e.g. extract style and palette keywords for the next generation
assistant.presetStyleText: Analyze visual style, medium, and artist mood; list reusable style keywords.
assistant.presetPaletteText: Extract dominant colors, accents, and lighting tones for the next generation.
assistant.presetSubjectText: Describe subject, composition, and framing; suggest one iteration direction.
assistant.presetKeywordsText: List 10–15 English keywords suitable for text-to-image models, comma-separated.
assistant.taskCardsDesc: Manage parallel creative tasks and run them in batch when ready (MindCraft-style).
assistant.taskCardsEmpty: Queue tasks from canvas or manually — batch image-to-prompt, reference analysis, or lyrics

download.title: Model Download
download.name: Model Name
download.quickStartDesc: One-click download recommended commercially usable open-source models (e.g. FLUX.1 [schnell])
download.modelPathPlaceholder: Absolute path to model file or folder
download.commercialUseBadgeTip: Registry marks this model as commercially usable; verify the upstream license before production use
download.localQuantNeedFull: Install a full version above (e.g. FP16) first; then you can generate local quantized weights here
download.prequantizedHint: Usually pick full or this, not both
download.noUserLoras: No user-trained LoRAs yet. Train one from LoRA Train.
download.deleteUserLoraMessage: Remove "{name}" from your library and delete adapter files?
download.deleteConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
This will delete {path} directory.
download.batchDownloadStart: Starting batch download of recommended models...
download.importWarn: Please provide model name and path
download.importSuccess: Model "{name}" recorded. Please place model files in the specified path.

settings.title: Settings
settings.generalDesc: Language, theme and output format preferences
settings.performanceDesc: Memory limits, model cache and queue behavior
settings.canvasAutoAddImageDesc: After image generation, add outputs to the active image canvas even in gallery view
settings.canvasAutoAddVideoDesc: After video generation, add outputs to the active video canvas even in gallery view
settings.canvasAutoAddAudioDesc: After audio generation, add outputs to the active audio canvas even in gallery view
settings.workspaceDesc: Storage paths for models, outputs and config
settings.maintenanceDesc: Restore factory defaults and data reset
settings.defaultLlmModelDesc: Used for chat, prompt enhancement, and task diagnosis
settings.defaultLlmThinkDesc: When enabled, Thinking models reason before answering. Chat shows the full stream; prompt enhance, lyrics, and node notes return only the final answer after reasoning.
settings.defaultVlmModelDesc: Used for canvas node AI image notes
settings.modelCacheTtlDesc: Models unused for longer than this will be automatically unloaded to free memory
settings.modelConfigDesc: Configure default parameters for each model
settings.publicConfigDesc: Output settings shared by all models
settings.huggingfaceTokenDesc: Create a Read token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens
settings.loraTriggerWordsHint: Automatically appended to prompt when template is applied
settings.noTemplates: No templates yet, click the button above to add
settings.nsfwDesc: When enabled, LoRA search will also return NSFW models
settings.queueImageFirstDesc: When enabled, image tasks dequeue before video tasks at the same user priority.
settings.presetNamePlaceholder: Enter preset name, e.g. "High Quality Mode"
settings.deletePresetConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete template "{name}"?
settings.autoSavePromptsDesc: When enabled, image/video prompt drafts are stored in this browser only.
settings.customWorkspacePlaceholder: Choose or enter an empty directory path
settings.customWorkspaceHint: Config, database, models, and outputs live under the workspace: config/, db/, models/, outputs/.
settings.customWorkspaceRestartHint: Restart the application after changing the workspace.
settings.workspaceSetupIntro: On first launch, pick an empty folder for config, database, models, and outputs. Existing data will be moved from the current location into that folder.
settings.workspaceSetupEmptyHint: The target folder must be empty (missing or containing no files or subfolders).
settings.workspaceChangeConfirm: All data from the current workspace ({from}) will be moved to the new empty folder ({to}). This cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.workspaceChangeConfirmFinal: Please confirm again: you must restart the app after migration. Proceed?
settings.configMaintenanceDesc: Restore workspace config files to factory defaults (from default_config/). This cannot be undone.
settings.restoreModelRegistryDesc: Resets only models_registry.json (model list and parameter declarations). Downloaded weights under models/ are not deleted.
settings.restoreModelRegistryConfirm: This overwrites models_registry.json in your workspace with factory defaults. Your registry edits will be lost. Downloaded model files are not removed. Continue?
settings.restorePromptTemplatesDesc: Overwrites presets.json in your workspace with factory defaults; all custom prompt templates will be lost.
settings.restorePromptTemplatesConfirm: This overwrites presets.json in your workspace with factory defaults. All custom templates will be lost. Continue?
settings.restoreRegistryRestartHint: Model registry restored. Restart the application for the model list and declarations to fully apply.
settings.presetMediaScopeHint: Required: template appears on image or video create pages only (not both).
settings.memoryWarningLargeModel: The installed version ({size}) may exceed your memory capacity
settings.memoryInsufficientForAllVersions: Your memory ({memory} GB) is insufficient to run any version of this model
settings.modelNotInstalled: Model not installed. Please go to Models page to download
settings.noParamPresets: No presets yet. Click the button above to save current parameters
settings.setAsDefaultPreset: Set as default preset for this model
settings.noReadyModelForAction: No ready {action} models. Please download from the Models page.
